10:T6fc,
# Tailwind CSS 最佳实践

Tailwind CSS 是一个功能优先的 CSS 框架，以下是一些最佳实践。

## 1. 使用 @apply 谨慎

避免过度使用 `@apply`，它会破坏 Tailwind 的原子性：

```css
/* ❌ 不推荐 */
.btn {
  @apply px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg;
}

/* ✅ 推荐 */
<button class="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg">
  Click me
</button>
```

## 2. 组件提取

将重复的模式提取为组件：

```tsx
// ❌ 重复
<div class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white rounded-lg shadow">
<div class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white rounded-lg shadow">

// ✅ 提取为 Card 组件
function Card({ children, className }) {
  return (
    <div className={cn(
      "flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white rounded-lg shadow",
      className
    )}>
      {children}
    </div>
  )
}
```

## 3. 响应式设计

使用移动优先的响应式设计：

```tsx
// 小屏幕默认，移动端友好
<div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">

// 条件类
<div className={cn(
  "p-4",
  isActive ? "bg-blue-500" : "bg-gray-500"
)}>
```

## 4. 暗色模式

使用 `dark:` 变体：

```tsx
<div className="bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 text-gray-900 dark:text-white">
  <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Hello World</h1>
</div>
```

## 5. 自定义配置

在 `tailwind.config.ts` 中扩展主题：

```ts
export default {
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        brand: {
          50: '#f0f9ff',
          500: '#0ea5e9',
          900: '#0c4a6e',
        }
      },
      animation: {
        'spin-slow': 'spin 3s linear infinite',
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## 总结

Tailwind CSS 的核心理念是实用优先，保持代码简洁和可维护是关键。6:["$","article",null,{"className":"max-w-4xl mx-auto","children":[["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-8","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight mb-4","children":"Tailwind CSS 最佳实践"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-4 text-muted-foreground mb-4","children":["$","time",null,{"dateTime":"2026-03-13","children":"2026-03-13"}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap gap-2","children":[["$","$L2","Tailwind",{"href":"/tags/Tailwind","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 cursor-pointer","children":"Tailwind"}]}],["$","$L2","CSS",{"href":"/tags/CSS","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 cursor-pointer","children":"CSS"}]}],["$","$L2","Web Development",{"href":"/tags/Web%20Development","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 cursor-pointer","children":"Web Development"}]}]]}]]}],["$","$Lf",null,{"source":"$10"}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"mt-12 pt-8 border-t","children":["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/","className":"text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary","children":"← 返回首页"}]}]]}]
